title: abutilon integerrimum
intro: Abutilon integerrimum, also known as the Indian mallow or country mallow, is a plant species in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. Abutilon integerrimum has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Abutilon integerrimum include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
